title: KB Patch Metadata
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of files in patches/. A patch is a surface-level correction (typo, dead link, metadata fix, factual detail update) that does NOT question the strategy of the target entry. Patches can be merged on CI green; they do not require curator review. For substantive disputes use a challenge instead.

patches.description: ID of the entry being patched.

patch_type.description: What kind of surface correction. 'lesson-subsequent-update' appends to a Mistake's Subsequent Updates block; it does NOT delete or rewrite the original Mistake.

applied_to.description: Which file inside the target entry the patch modifies.
